events.event_description: First U.S. Ambassador to Grenada (Theodore Roosevelt Britton) presented credentials while resident in Bridgetown, establishing nonresident ambassadorial relations.

evidence.quote: Theodore Roosevelt Britton, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1974-12-09. Credentials presented: 1975-02-25. Left Bridgetown 1977-04-22.

events.event_description: Embassy St. Georges was formally established, elevating U.S. representation from a nonresident ambassadorship to a resident embassy.

evidence.quote: Embassy St. Georges was established on February 2, 1984.
